metadata.description: A marketplace of AI-powered browser automation workflows for Claude Code

plugins.name: agent-web-interface
plugins.description: Browser automation MCP server and operational guide for live web page interaction

plugins.name: e2e-test-builder
plugins.description: Workflow runner for adding Playwright E2E tests to existing codebases — analyzes, plans, explores, generates specs, and writes tests

plugins.name: site-knowledge
plugins.description: Site-specific automation patterns and knowledge for popular websites (Airbnb, Amazon, Apple Store)

plugins.name: md-export
plugins.description: Export markdown files to clean, dark-themed PDFs

plugins.name: web-bench
plugins.description: WebBench benchmark runner — executes real-world browser tasks from Halluminate/WebBench dataset, scores via LLM-as-judge, and produces evaluation reports
